raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-affirmation and declaration of personal transformation, expressing a process of intentional identity change and self-acceptance.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Identity is something that can be actively re-coded or redefined.",
    "One can consciously release or shed previously held roles.",
    "Self-love can coexist with ongoing personal evolution.",
    "Future versions of oneself can be embodied in the present moment."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "The statement is internally coherent as a series of interrelated self-directed affirmations that follow a logical sequence (re-coding, releasing, loving, welcoming).",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": [
    "The speaker is engaged in intentional personal growth or identity work.",
    "The audience seeks encouragement or inspiration for self-transformation.",
    "The statement is used as a mantra or therapeutic tool to reinforce positive change."
  ],
  "conditions_for_misleading": [
    "If taken literally as a claim that identity change is effortless or instantaneous.",
    "If used to dismiss genuine psychological challenges or external constraints on identity.",
    "If the speaker uses it to avoid responsibility for past actions or roles without genuine change."
  ]
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: Self-affirmation and declaration of personal transformation, expressing a process of intentional identity change and self-acceptance.
implicit_claims: Identity is something that can be actively re-coded or redefined.
One can consciously release or shed previously held roles.
Self-love can coexist with ongoing personal evolution.
Future versions of oneself can be embodied in the present moment.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: The statement is internally coherent as a series of interrelated self-directed affirmations that follow a logical sequence (re-coding, releasing, loving, welcoming).
conditions_for_usefulness: The speaker is engaged in intentional personal growth or identity work.
The audience seeks encouragement or inspiration for self-transformation.
The statement is used as a mantra or therapeutic tool to reinforce positive change.
conditions_for_misleading: If taken literally as a claim that identity change is effortless or instantaneous.
If used to dismiss genuine psychological challenges or external constraints on identity.
If the speaker uses it to avoid responsibility for past actions or roles without genuine change.
